description: A savory soup known for balancing tangy and spicy flavors, typically using ingredients such as mushrooms, tofu, egg, vinegar, white pepper, and a thickened broth. Restaurant versions vary by region and style.
preparation_steps: Add vegetables, tofu, and any meat if using.
Adjust the hot and sour balance with pepper and vinegar.
Add beaten egg in a thin stream if using and serve hot.

health_advice.benefits: Can be relatively light while still flavorful, especially when it includes tofu and vegetables.
health_advice.risks: Restaurant versions can be high in sodium. Some recipes rely heavily on starch for thickness.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Use moderate sodium broth and keep the thickener light.

dietary_notes.note: Vegetarian and vegan versions are possible with vegetable broth and without egg. Gluten-free suitability depends on soy sauce or other seasonings used.
